top_signals.title: ‘Incredible work’: Ukrainian F-16 downs Russian fighter jet for first time
top_signals.summary: The kill, confirmed by the top U.S. general, is the latest sign of Kyiv's growing air power — pulled off by one of the oldest fighters in the sky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FedRAMP Rev5 Is Ending: What the 20x Transition Really Requires
top_signals.summary: FedRAMP 20X replaces point-in-time assessments with continuous, machine-readable evidence that demonstrates security controls are working. Anecdotes explains what the transition from Rev5 to FedRAMP 20X means and how organizations can prepare for continuous, evidence-based assurance. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Intel shares rally after chipmaker posts fastest growth in 15 years
top_signals.summary: Chipmaker’s revenue jumped 25% in the second quarter

top_signals.title: Intel blows past estimates, recording fastest sales growth in almost 15 years on 'unprecedented' demand
top_signals.summary: Despite a recent slump in the stock, Intel shares are still up over 170% this year.
